Interface Item

All Known Implementing Classes:
Armor, Arrow, Curse, Gold, MagicItem, ManaStone, MeleeWeapon, RangeWeapon, Shield
public sealed interface Item permits RangeWeapon, Arrow, MeleeWeapon, Armor, Shield, ManaStone, MagicItem, Gold, Curse
Represents a generic item that can be placed in the hero's backpack and optionally used in combat. All items define their shape, rarity, price, and detailed description.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    details()
    Returns a textual description of this item, explaining its behavior.
    default boolean
    isArmor()
    Indicates whether this item is classified as a piece of armor.
    boolean
    isCurse()
    Indicates whether this item is classified as a curse.
    default boolean
    isManaStone()
    Indicates whether this item is classified as a mana stone.
    String
    name()
    Returns the full display name of this item.
    List<Position>
    pos()
    Returns the relative grid positions occupied by this item.
    int
    price()
    Returns the price of this item when bought or sold.
    Rarity
    rarity()
    Returns the rarity of this item.
    default boolean
    rotatable()
    Indicates whether this item can be rotated in the backpack.
    default List<Position>
    shapeAtRotation(int rotation)
    Calculates the rotated shape of the item according to the rotation angle.
    String
    toString()
    Returns a short string representation used for compact display (e.g., in the backpack grid).
    boolean
    use(Heros heros, Ennemi target, BackPack backpack, ItemInstance instance)
    Executes the item's unique effect during a combat turn.

  • Method Details

    • price

      int price()
      Returns the price of this item when bought or sold.
      Returns:
      the item's price (must be non-negative)

    • toString

      String toString()
      Returns a short string representation used for compact display (e.g., in the backpack grid).
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a short identifier string

    • pos

      List<Position> pos()
      Returns the relative grid positions occupied by this item. The origin (0,0) corresponds to the top-left pivot point.
      Returns:
      a list of relative positions describing the item’s shape

    • name

      String name()
      Returns the full display name of this item.
      Returns:
      the name of the item

    • details

      String details()
      Returns a textual description of this item, explaining its behavior.
      Returns:
      a description string

    • rarity

      Rarity rarity()
      Returns the rarity of this item.
      Returns:
      the item rarity

    • rotatable

      default boolean rotatable()
      Indicates whether this item can be rotated in the backpack.
      Returns:
      true if the item can rotate, false otherwise

    • shapeAtRotation

      default List<Position> shapeAtRotation(int rotation)
      Calculates the rotated shape of the item according to the rotation angle.
      Parameters:
      originalShape - the original shape of the item
      angle - the rotation angle in degrees
      Returns:
      a list of positions representing the rotated shape

    • isManaStone

      default boolean isManaStone()
      Indicates whether this item is classified as a mana stone. Default implementation returns false. Specific item types should override this to return true.
      Returns:
      true if the item is a mana stone; false otherwise.

    • use

      boolean use(Heros heros, Ennemi target, BackPack backpack, ItemInstance instance)
      Executes the item's unique effect during a combat turn. This method defines how an item interacts with the hero, the target enemy, and the backpack's layout (for adjacency or positional bonuses).
      Parameters:
      heros - the hero character initiating the item's use.
      target - the enemy character currently targeted by the hero.
      backpack - the backpack instance containing the item, used to calculate bonuses.
      instance - the specific instance of the item being triggered.
      Returns:
      true if the item was successfully activated; false if requirements were not met.

    • isCurse

      boolean isCurse()
      Indicates whether this item is classified as a curse.

      Curses are typically negative items that occupy space in the backpack and may provide detrimental effects. They are usually filtered out of rewards like treasure chests and are primarily obtained through combat or specific dark events.

      Returns:
      true if the item is a curse; false otherwise.

    • isArmor

      default boolean isArmor()
      Indicates whether this item is classified as a piece of armor. By default, this returns false. Armor items should override this to return true to enable passive protection calculations during combat.
      Returns:
      true if the item is armor; false otherwise.
